name: Macadamia Chocolate Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Dark Belgian chocolate, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill a 10-inch pie pan for 30 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Procedure for Crust:
a. Beat sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
b. Add egg, mixing well.
c. Mix in flour thoroughly.
d. Roll the dough on wax paper and transfer it to the chilled pan.
e. Use a fork to crimp the edges of the crust.
f. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the crust is golden brown, about 10 minutes.
g. Cool.
4. Procedure for Filling:
a. Roast nuts in the oven at 200°F (100°C) for 5 to 10 minutes.
b. Melt the chocolate.
c. Heat the cream and add it to the chocolate, stirring well.
d. Mix in Frangelico liqueur.
e. Add roasted nuts and stir until blended.
f. Pour into the crust and cool.
5. Presentation:
Decorate with shaved white chocolate or whipped cream topped with chopped macadamia nuts.
